name: lone shadow
short_description: "Lone Shadow" is a third-person shooter game.
detailed_description:
In the game, you will play as a soldier fighting against many masked criminals. At the start of the game, you have no weapons and must rely on stealth to gather weapons, using surprise attacks to deal deadly damage to enemies!

A headshot will result in an instant kill.

The unique stealth system ensures that as long as you're not too close to enemies, you won't be detected. This allows you to better aim for their heads.

Multiple difficulty levels are available, and in the high-difficulty mode, there will be more enemies, and some areas will have no cover.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
